name: Impossible Tuna Pie Tspn00b
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a pie plate that is 10 inches in diameter and 1 1/2 inches deep.
3. In the prepared pie plate, mix together the tuna, shredded cheese, diced cream cheese, sliced green onions, chopped pimiento, milk, Bisquick, eggs, salt, and nutmeg until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the greased pie plate.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes, or until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean.
6. Allow the pie to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
7. Serve with sliced tomatoes. This recipe serves 6-8 people.
Variations:
- Seafood Pie: Substitute 1 package (6 oz) of frozen crabmeat or shrimp, thawed and drained, for the tuna.
- High Altitude: Increase baking time to 45-50 minutes.
